title: Federal Reserve Supervision and Regulation Report

source.name: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System

summary: This is a navigation/listing page that indexes multiple Federal Reserve Supervision and Regulation Reports spanning 2018 to December 2025, along with associated congressional testimony links. No specific report content, data, or policy details are included in this page itself.
key_points: This is a navigation page listing links to archived reports, not a substantive research document
Reports indexed from 2018 through December 2025 (most recent)
Each reporting period links to HTML, PDF formats, and data sources
Includes links to Vice Chair for Supervision congressional testimony
No specific banking conditions, supervisory findings, or regulatory details are contained in this listing page
why_it_matters: This page serves as an index to historical Federal Reserve supervisory reports but contains no actionable information. Researchers seeking banking condition assessments or supervisory findings must navigate to specific report links. The listing page itself is not directly useful for macro catalyst or market structure analysis.

issues_found: Source is a listing/navigation page with no substantive content - triggers Rule #5 rejection
URL is empty in source metadata, making proper attribution impossible
No specific macro data, policy decisions, or market-relevant findings can be extracted
Record correctly identifies the source as non-archivable, which aligns with verification standards

notes: Source is a high-tier domain (federalreserve.gov) listing historical supervisory reports. However, per CORE RULE #6, listing pages and navigation pages are treated as non-archiveable. The most recent report linked is from December 2025 (within 90 days of TODAY). To capture the actual supervisory and regulatory content, individual report URLs would need to be processed separately.
